property.name: mandatoryModular
property.value: {'ship_command': ['Ship Command', 'Encounter', True], 'you_must_have_faith_by_bluehg': ['You Must Have Faith', 'Encounter', True]}

property.name: recommendedModular
property.value: {'drax_clones_by_bluehg': ['Drax Clones', 'Encounter', True]}

property.name: Text
property.value: [star] Forced Interrupt: After Matriarch schemes against you, create 1 Faithful Zealot minion and put it into play engaged with you. That minion cannot attack or scheme this phase except by card effects.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Who are they? Unbelievers? Anti-Church heretics?"

property.name: Text
property.value: Each [[FAITHFUL]] minion gets +1 hit points.

property.name: Quote
property.value: The orbit ways teem with Templeships and pilgrim traffic. The Faithful accumulate here. And, as ever, she is waiting to bless them.

card.name: Matriarch
card.property: Forced Response: After a friendly character is defeated, place 2 threat on the main scheme. Forced Response: After a [[FAITHFUL]] minion is defeated, heal 1 damage from Matriarch.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Who are they? Unbelievers? Anti-Church heretics?"

card.name: Find The Truth
card.property: Contents: Matriarch (I) and Matriarch (II). (Matriarch (II) and Matriarch (III) instead for expert mode.) Universal Church of Truth, Ship Command, You Must Have Faith, and Standard encounter sets. One modular encounter set (Drax Clones). Setup: Set aside the Spartax environment, the Phone for Help side scheme, and the 10 copies of Faithful Zealot. Put the Templeship environment into play.

alternate.name: Find The Truth
alternate.property: Each **FAITHFUL** minion gains guard. Forced Interrupt: When the player phase begins, each player creates 1 Faithful Zealot minion and puts it into play engaged with them.

property.name: Quote
property.value: The Church has been amassing an army... but what for? Maybe if you let their scheme advance you'll figure out what they're up to.

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: If the Templeship Damaged environment is in play, deal each player 1 encounter card. Deal the first player 1 additional encounter card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: You don't know all the pieces to the plan yet, but you do know that the Church is targeting Spartax, homeworld of King J'son, Star-Lord's father. You have to stop them!

alternate.name: Shipboard Struggle
alternate.property: When Revealed: If the Templeship environment is in play, place 3 [per_hero] threat here. Forced Response: After Matriarch takes damage from an attack, shuffle the bottommost [[RESERVES]] card from the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. (Limit once per round per player.)

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: If the Templeship environment is in play, remove it from the game and put the Spartax Damaged environment into play. If the Templeship Damaged environment is in play, remove it from the game and put the Spartax environment into play.

property.name: Quote
property.value: It's time for Spartax's last stand against the Universal Church of Truth. Help them!

alternate.name: Battle Of Spartax
alternate.property: Each FAITHFUL minion loses guard and gets +1 ATK. Hero Action: Exhaust the Milano → ignore this card's "Forced Response" ability until the end of the round. Forced Response: After a FAITHFUL minion is defeated, place 1 threat here. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

card.name: Templeship

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Aerial. Vehicle.

card.property: Templeship may be attacked as if it were a minion not engaged with any player. Each [[FAITHFUL]] minion gets +1 SCH. When Defeated: Flip this card over.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Damaging the ship might slow them down, but it's dangerous. Make sure the Milano's ready when it blows!

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Aerial. Vehicle.

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Each player takes 4 indirect damage (1 indirect damage instead, if the Milano is ready). The villain takes 3 damage. Defeat each FAITHFUL minion in play. Put the set-aside Phone for Help side scheme into play.

property.name: Quote
property.value: That explosion should get someone helpful's attention.

property.name: Text
property.value: Action: Exhaust the Milano and choose a player → that player draws 1 card (2 cards, instead, if their identity is in its alter-ego form).

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Planet Spartax. It's damn nice."—Star-Lord

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Action: Exhaust the Milano and choose a player → characters that player controls get +1 THW until the end of the round.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I will pray you find peace for your impending suffering." —Matriarch

card.name: Phone For Help
card.property: Hinder 3 [per_hero]. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust your identity → remove threat from this scheme equal to your REC. When Defeated: Flip this card over.

property.name: Quote
property.value: So the ship isn't completely blown up, but you did some damage. That explosion will definitely get some people looking. Better let them know there are friendlies onboard.

alternate.name: Nova Corps

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Nova Corps.

alternate.property: Permanent. The first player gains control of Nova Corps. Action: Remove 1 corps counter from here → deal 1 damage to an enemy. Interrupt: When the player phase ends, place corps counters here until there are 1 plus 1 [per_hero] corps counters here.

card.name: Cardinal Of Truth
card.property:
[star] Cardinal of Truth gets +1 ATK for each keyword it has. Forced Response: After Cardinal of Truth gains a keyword, heal all damage from it.
[star] Boost: Heal 2 damage from Matriarch.

card.name: Powered By Faith
card.property: Hinder 1[per_hero]. Each [[FAITHFUL]] enemy gains villainous. Hero Action: Exhaust the Milano → treat this card's text box as blank until the end of the round.

property.name: Quote
property.value: They call these "faith batteries." Real people, bottled up, and used for their faith.

property.name: Text
property.value: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Each [[FAITHFUL]] enemy gains quickstrike. Hero Action: Exhaust the Milano → treat this card's text box as blank until the end of the round.

property.name: Quote
property.value: You don't know what "truth" it is this church is fighting for. You just know it hurts.

card.name: Drax Clone

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Clone. Faithful.

card.property: [star] If Drax Clone is a minion, he gets +1 ATK for each point of damage he has. Alter-Ego Action: Spend [wild][wild][wild] resources → take control of Drax Clone, treating him as an ally. Drax Clone loses the [[FAITHFUL]] trait, his THW is equal to his printed SCH, and he takes 1 consequential damage for thwarting or attacking. (His printed resource cost is considered to be 0.)

card.name: Ceaseless Bodies
card.property: Peril. Choose one: • Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a Drax Clone minion and put him into play engaged with you. • Shuffle all copies of Drax Clone from the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. This card gains surge.

card.name: Field Of Cocoons
card.property: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Forced Response: After the round ends, place 1 hibernation counter here. Then, if there are 3 or more hibernation counters here, search the encounter deck and discard pile for all copies of Drax Clone and put them into play engaged with the first player and discard this side scheme.

card.name: Faithful Zealot
card.property: Guard. (While this minion is engaged with you, you cannot attack the villain.) Patrol. (While this minion is engaged with you, you cannot thwart the main scheme.)

property.name: Quote
property.value: You Must Have Faith

card.name: Grand Unifier Raker

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Elite. Faithful.

card.property: Toughness. Forced Response: After Grand Unifier Raker is damaged by an attack, give a tough status card to the villain. * Boost: Give the villain a tough status card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "The Church demands your submission."

card.name: Have Faith
card.property: Treat attached ally as a [[Faithful]] minion with a blank text box. Attached minion's SCH is equal to its printed THW and it does not take consequential damage. When Revealed: Attach to the ally with the highest cost without Have Faith attached. Attached ally engages its controller. Otherwise, this card gains surge.

card.name: Army Of The Faithful
card.property: When Revealed: Create 2 Faithful Zealot minions and put them into play engaged with you. If no enemies are put into play this way, this card gains surge. * Boost: Create 1 Faithful Zealot minion and put it into play engaged with you.

property.name: Text
property.value: Forced Interrupt: When the round ends, create 2 Faithful Zealot minions and put them into play engaged with the first player. The first player may exhaust a [[Vehicle]] card they control to reduce the number of Faithful Zealot minions created by this effect to 1.
